---
title: "Gustavo's Job Market Hub"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Welcome!

You are here either because you are a recommendation letter writer or because someone pointed you out to my job market materials. This page is semi-public, but feel free to share if it's helpful.

Feel free to check other tabs to know more about me.

## Materials

- Cover letter [`[Comparative]`](job_market/cover_letter/cover_letter_cp.pdf) [`[Methods]`](job_market/cover_letter/cover_letter_methods.pdf)
